automation: Playwright + DBAUTH session cookie (headless Chromium on WSL2)

prompts.notes: Genie loaded the routing skill and returned a 3-column table (mode / description / SKILL.md section). Visible modes include frame, align, validate, evolve, design, backfill — each with §-prefixed section citation. Skill discovery, frontmatter, and routing logic all confirmed working.

Genie attempted to read directories in the user's workspace (datahelix, .helix, templates) rather than resolving paths relative to its own skill bundle at /Workspace/.assistant/skills/helix/references/activities/. Failed to find the catalog. Reveals a path-resolution gap: Genie Code does not auto-mount sibling directories of SKILL.md for skill use. See follow-up bead helix-<TBD>.

Prompt was submitted while catalog-reachable was still exploring; Genie queued it but the script's wait timeout fired before processing began. Not a HELIX bug — driver-script wait needs tuning for Genie's slow folder-traversal cadence.

summary: 1 of 3 prompts demonstrated clean pass. Prompt 2 surfaced a real product finding: Genie's path-resolution behavior does not treat SKILL.md's parent as a content root. Recording captured the full automated flow including the discovered limitation.
follow_ups: Investigate Genie Code's skill-bundle path resolution; consider inline-catalog or explicit-path-in-SKILL.md remedies
Tune drive-genie.py response-stability wait to 8-12s and use the Genie-panel DOM container, not <main>, for text capture
Re-run after path resolution is understood
